# 010 - dbt Templates

## Metadata

```yaml
prompt_id: "010"
phase: 2
agent: "@template-engine"
model: "opus 4.5"
priority: P0
estimated_effort: "2 days"
dependencies: ["008"]
```

## Objective

Create Jinja2 templates for dbt model generation including staging, intermediate, and marts layers.

## Task Description

Implement templates for generating dbt models that follow best practices for the semantic layer.

## Requirements

### dbt Model Template

```jinja2
{# templates/dbt/model.sql.j2 #}
{#
  Parameters:
    - model_name: str
    - description: str
    - source_name: str
    - source_table: str
    - columns: List[ColumnDef]
    - where_clause: Optional[str]
    - materialization: str (view, table, incremental)
    - unique_key: Optional[str] - for incremental
#}
{{- '{{' }} config(
    materialized='{{ materialization }}',
{% if materialization == 'incremental' and unique_key %}
    unique_key='{{ unique_key }}',
    incremental_strategy='merge',
{% endif %}
    tags=['{{ model_name | split('_') | first }}']
) {{ '}}' }}

{# 
    Model: {{ model_name }}
    Description: {{ description }}
    Generated by NovaSight Template Engine
#}

WITH source_data AS (
    SELECT
{% for col in columns %}
        {{ col.source_name | default(col.name) }}{% if col.alias %} AS {{ col.alias }}{% endif %}{% if not loop.last %},{% endif %}

{% endfor %}
    FROM {{ '{{' }} source('{{ source_name }}', '{{ source_table }}') {{ '}}' }}
{% if where_clause %}
    WHERE {{ where_clause }}
{% endif %}
{% if materialization == 'incremental' %}
    {% raw %}{% if is_incremental() %}{% endraw %}
    
    AND updated_at > (SELECT MAX(updated_at) FROM {{ '{{' }} this {{ '}}' }})
    {% raw %}{% endif %}{% endraw %}
{% endif %}
)

SELECT
{% for col in columns %}
    {{ col.alias | default(col.name) }}{% if col.cast %}::{{ col.cast }}{% endif %}{% if not loop.last %},{% endif %}

{% endfor %}
FROM source_data
```

### dbt Schema Template

```jinja2
{# templates/dbt/schema.yml.j2 #}
{#
  Parameters:
    - model_name: str
    - description: str
    - columns: List[ColumnDef]
    - tests: List[TestDef]
#}
version: 2

models:
  - name: {{ model_name }}
    description: "{{ description }}"
    config:
      contract:
        enforced: true
    columns:
{% for col in columns %}
      - name: {{ col.name }}
        description: "{{ col.description | default('') }}"
        data_type: {{ col.data_type }}
{% if col.tests %}
        tests:
{% for test in col.tests %}
          - {{ test }}
{% endfor %}
{% endif %}
{% if col.constraints %}
        constraints:
{% for constraint in col.constraints %}
          - type: {{ constraint }}
{% endfor %}
{% endif %}
{% endfor %}
```

### dbt Sources Template

```jinja2
{# templates/dbt/sources.yml.j2 #}
{#
  Parameters:
    - source_name: str
    - database: str
    - schema: str
    - tables: List[TableDef]
#}
version: 2

sources:
  - name: {{ source_name }}
    database: {{ database }}
    schema: {{ schema }}
    description: "Source data from {{ source_name }}"
    tables:
{% for table in tables %}
      - name: {{ table.name }}
        description: "{{ table.description | default('') }}"
{% if table.freshness %}
        freshness:
          warn_after: {count: {{ table.freshness.warn }}, period: hour}
          error_after: {count: {{ table.freshness.error }}, period: hour}
        loaded_at_field: {{ table.loaded_at_field | default('updated_at') }}
{% endif %}
{% if table.columns %}
        columns:
{% for col in table.columns %}
          - name: {{ col.name }}
            description: "{{ col.description | default('') }}"
{% endfor %}
{% endif %}
{% endfor %}
```

### dbt Metric Template

```jinja2
{# templates/dbt/metric.yml.j2 #}
{#
  Parameters:
    - metric_name: str
    - label: str
    - description: str
    - model: str
    - expression: str
    - calculation: str (derived, cumulative, etc.)
    - dimensions: List[str]
    - filters: List[FilterDef]
#}
version: 2

semantic_models:
  - name: {{ model }}_semantic
    model: ref('{{ model }}')
    defaults:
      agg_time_dimension: event_date
    
    entities:
      - name: {{ model }}_id
        type: primary
        expr: id
    
    measures:
      - name: {{ metric_name }}
        description: "{{ description }}"
        agg: {{ calculation }}
        expr: {{ expression }}
    
    dimensions:
{% for dim in dimensions %}
      - name: {{ dim.name }}
        type: {{ dim.type | default('categorical') }}
        expr: {{ dim.expr | default(dim.name) }}
{% endfor %}
```

## Expected Output

```
backend/templates/dbt/
├── model.sql.j2
├── schema.yml.j2
├── sources.yml.j2
├── metric.yml.j2
├── staging_model.sql.j2
├── intermediate_model.sql.j2
└── marts_model.sql.j2
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Templates generate valid dbt models
- [ ] YAML schemas pass dbt validation
- [ ] Incremental models configured correctly
- [ ] Source freshness checks work
- [ ] Metric definitions valid
- [ ] All templates follow dbt best practices
